metadata.name: AG-05 MobileFrontend
metadata.description: Mobile UI agent for the SISE Expo application.

properties.dependencies: Consumes API from [AG-03] BackendModule; uses repository contract files for shared shapes.

responsibilities: Integrate native Camera and Image Picker.
Manage offline cache for recent search results.
constraints: MUST NOT call AG‑01 or AG‑02 directly.
verification: Validate type safety against repository contract files and mobile build checks.
Perform integration tests with BackendModule APIs.
